channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nine kidnapped victims escape after terrorists fall asleep in Katsina forest
item.description: At least nine kidnapped victims escaped from their abductors during a military operation in Katsina State. The Joint Task Force North West, Operation Fansan Yamma, rescued the victims and recovered 56...

item.title: Taylor Farms links cyclospora outbreak to lettuce supply chain
item.description: A significant foodborne illness outbreak linked to cyclosporiasis has been traced to shredded iceberg lettuce sourced from Taylor Farms' facility in Guanajuato, Mexico. Health officials in Michigan ha...

item.title: The Failed Backlash Against Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey
item.description: Christopher Nolan's adaptation of Homer's 'The Odyssey' has defied a significant backlash, achieving record-breaking box office success despite intense online criticism. The film, which faced accusati...

item.title: Escalating U.S.-Iran Conflict Raises Fears of Larger War
item.description: The U.S. and Iran are engaged in an escalating military conflict, with the U.S. military striking a broader range of targets in Iran and Iran launching attacks across the Persian Gulf. The clash cente...

item.title: Ombudsman Remulla Orders Reevaluation of 2019 SEA Games Sports Facilities Case
item.description: The Ombudsman's Office has initiated a new review of the 2019 Southeast Asian Games (SEA Games) sports facilities construction case, which was previously dismissed due to insufficient evidence. Ombuds...

item.title: Trump Threatens Tariffs on Canada Over Wildfire Smoke
item.description: President Donald Trump has threatened to impose tariffs on Canada as a form of retaliation for the influx of wildfire smoke from Canadian forests into the United States. The statement, made on Truth S...

item.title: The Orchid: A Revolutionary Music Device Co-Created by Tame Impala's Kevin Parker and Innovator Tom Cosm
item.description: The article details the creation of the Orchid, a groundbreaking music device co-developed by Tame Impala's Kevin Parker and innovator Tom Cosm. Designed to democratize music creation, the Orchid comb...

item.title: U.S.-Canada wildfire tensions escalate as political blame and mutual aid efforts emerge
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has intensified criticism of Canada over wildfire smoke drifting across the border, threatening to raise import tariffs on Canadian goods. The president accused Canada of '...

item.title: Hawaii Supreme Court Opinion Criticizes U.S. Supreme Court's Constitutional Approach While Ordering New Trial
item.description: The Hawaii Supreme Court issued an opinion overturning the 1990 rape conviction of Daniel Granillo and ordering a new trial after concluding that discredited FBI hair-and-fiber testimony deprived him ...

item.title: India-Japan Collaborate on Mumbai-Ahmedabad Bullet Rail Project with Shinkansen Trains by 2030
item.description: The Indian government and Japan are advancing the Mumbai-Ahmedabad high-speed rail project, with Japan set to supply next-gen Shinkansen trains by the early 2030s. Officials confirmed that while the E...

item.title: SANDF Members Killed in Mine Shaft Tragedy During Illegal Mining Operation
item.description: Two SANDF members lost their lives in a tragic mine shaft incident while pursuing illegal miners during Operation Prosper in Gauteng. The Ministry of Police, led by Deputy Ministers Dr Polly Boshielo ...

item.title: Arusha Hosts Major Automotive Trade Event in Tanzania
item.description: Arusha is actively preparing to host Tanzania's most significant automotive trade exhibition, which is set to take place on July 17, 2026. The event aims to bring together industry leaders, manufactur...

item.title: Jimothy the Raccoon: Seattle's Beloved Local Legend
item.description: Jimothy, a raccoon with a unique physical appearance, has become a beloved local legend in Seattle. Discovered by resident Kiana Hall in the Ballard neighborhood, the animal's distinctive rounded tors...

item.title: Obama Criticizes JD Vance's Hypocrisy on Immigration Rhetoric Amid Mixed Heritage
item.description: Former President Barack Obama criticized Vice President JD Vance for his nativist anti-immigrant rhetoric during a podcast interview with Malcolm Gladwell. Obama highlighted the irony of Vance promoti...

item.title: Billionaire Envoy's Super Yacht Diplomacy Sparks Protests in Venice
item.description: Hundreds of protesters clashed with riot police in Venice as billionaire American ambassador Tilman Fertitta arrived aboard his luxury yacht, the Boardwalk, during a diplomatic tour marking the 250th ...

item.title: Productivity Growth in Australia Fails to Boost Wages
item.description: The article explores the disconnect between Australia's productivity growth and stagnant real wages over the past three decades. Research from the Centre for Policy Development (CPD) and the Australia...

item.title: Mkapa’s Health Policies Continue to Shape Tanzania’s Healthcare System
item.description: Dr. Nchimbi highlights the enduring impact of former President Benjamin Mkapa's health policies on Tanzania's healthcare landscape. Mkapa, who led Tanzania from 1995 to 2005, implemented reforms that ...

item.title: Lauren Laverne reveals smouldering myeloma diagnosis
item.description: Broadcaster Lauren Laverne has disclosed she has been diagnosed with smouldering myeloma, a blood and bone marrow disorder that can progress to blood cancer. The 48-year-old BBC presenter, who previou...

item.title: Congress Urges Punjab Dissidents to Maintain Discipline and Avoid Public Dissent
item.description: The Congress party has sternly warned dissenting Punjab leaders to adhere to party discipline and avoid airing grievances against the state chief publicly. This came after prolonged public opposition ...

item.title: Five Candidates Compete for Vacant Dasmariñas, Cavite Congressional Seat
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) announced that five candidates have filed certificates of candidacy (COCs) for the special congressional elections in Dasmariñas, Cavite. The vacancy arose after ...
